calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-03-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted. Unopposed.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
